name: Peanut Butter Rice Krispies Treats
recipeIngredient: 10-oz regular marshmallows (about 40), or 4 cups miniature marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the marshmallows and stir until completely melted.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter until smooth.
4. Add the Rice Krispies and stir until well coated.
5. Using a buttered spatula or waxed paper, press the mixture into a 3-quart rectangular pan coated with cooking spray.
6. Cut into 2-inch squares when cool.
Microwave directions:
1. In a large microwave-safe bowl, microwave the margarine and marshmallows at HIGH for 1 minute longer.
2. Stir until smooth.
3. Add the cereal and stir until well coated.
4. Press into the pan as directed. Makes 24 squares.
